name: Enchilada Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef and onion; drain off grease. Set aside.
2. Mix mushroom soup and tomatoes in blender until smooth.
3. Add the mixture to the ground beef.
4. Grease a 9x13 inch casserole dish.
5. Layer 5 to 6 torn tortillas, half the ground beef mixture, and half the grated cheese.
6. Repeat layers, ending with cheese.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
